creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from ExtraDen <mixair@gmail.com> -----

From: ExtraDen <mixair@gmail.com>
To: Mark Linimon <linimon@lonesome.com>
Subject: Re: ports/129043: Experimental version of poptop in FreeBSD ports

Probably you are right, in this case I'd recommend to have another
port poptop 1.3.0 with the stable version. We'll submit a more
detailed bug-report of the current version to the developers of
poptop.

----- End forwarded message -----
